title: nephrodium pavonianum
intro: Nephrodium pavonianum, also known as the Pavonian Lady Fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Matonia. It is native to Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health conditions. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Nephrodium pavonianum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems.
